implemented_slices.change: Added exact payload-gated project-family rules for GCM maintenance, Access-A-Ride primary-carrier option years, Metro-North emergency/scheduled bus services, SBMP, TBTA traffic/revenue toll-related assessments, VNB median-barrier transfer services, and NYPA MCRA energy-efficiency projects.

Added exact payload-gated document-time-status rules for conducted/complete/active/approved project surfaces including Customers Count, Tremont safety, Van Wyck bridge replacement, Station ReNEW-vations, PII, Jamaica OTP, Bronx Ambassadors, GCM weekend maintenance, Boldyn connectivity, whistleblower policy review, and targeted lower-performing-route improvements.

Added payload-gated milestone rules for rating upgrades, court orders/rulings, lawsuit filings, accessibility settlements, procurement-intake records, debt/refunding/refinancing/remarketing transactions, CMAQ grant endpoints, and concrete rolling-stock delivery/retirement records.
Allowed neutral bus classifier artifacts in the local/limited-bus classifier guardrail so Q50 is treated as a true route rather than a split candidate.

subagents.result: Recommended 23 payload-proven milestone mappings; implemented in this slice.
Found 31 source-gap other records and a 13-record risk/contingency slice; deferred because it likely needs a new normalized value/policy.
Found 13 candidate document-time-status records; partially overlapped with implemented project/status slice, with remaining records needing exact follow-up review.
Recommended Q50 local/limited-bus classifier guardrail; implemented in this slice.
Confirmed current public identity-review pressure remains zero; proposed acronym-only candidate-edge guard for later advisory-path cleanup.

remaining_lanes.next_action: Continue small payload-gated milestone/publication/planning slices from residual examples.
Review the project/status scout's non-overlapping candidates with exact payload tests.
Treat as mostly one-off policy floor unless exact evidence supports a narrow rule.
Decide whether to add a bounded risk_or_contingency normalized value or map to an existing accepted value.
Leave aggregate/list and direct split candidates unresolved unless a Q50-like deterministic false positive emerges.
Implement acronym-only candidate-edge guard in advisory parser if reducing hidden false-positive pressure becomes a priority.

notes: The worktree was already very dirty from the broader campaign; unrelated dirty files were not reverted.
Canonical JSONL was updated through deterministic materialization, not hand-edited.
All subagents were read-only scouts and were closed after completion.
